backend/main.mo: Main backend actor implementing member management, payment tracking, and user profile systems with role-based access control (admin/user permissions) and blob storage integration.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting five implemented features: member management (up to 26 members), monthly installment tracking (₹1000/month), member detail pages, mobile-based login system, and admin panel with dashboard.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend files including pages, components, hooks, contexts, and configuration files for the group banking application.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS styles defining OKLCH color system with custom CSS variables for light and dark themes, including primary, secondary, accent, and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with basic meta tags, title 'Group Banking App', and root div mounting the React application via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component configuring providers (QueryClient, InternetIdentity, Language, Theme) and TanStack Router with routes for home, admin panel, and member detail pages.
frontend/src/components/AddMemberForm.ts: Admin form component for adding new members with name and 10-digit mobile number validation, displaying success/error toasts and clearing inputs on successful submission.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component displaying copyright year, app name, and attribution link to caffeine.ai with UTM tracking parameters based on hostname.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Main header component with authentication controls, user avatar dropdown menu (profile, admin, logout), language toggle, and app branding with navigation to home.
frontend/src/components/LanguageToggle.t: Button component that toggles between English and Hindi languages, displaying the opposite language name as the button label.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Root layout component that wraps pages with Header, Footer, and a gradient background container for the main content outlet.
frontend/src/components/LoginPage.tsx: Standalone login page with a centered card displaying app branding and an Internet Identity login button.
frontend/src/components/MemberCard.tsx: Card component displaying member avatar, name, mobile number, and joining date with hover effects and click handler.
frontend/src/components/MemberList.tsx: Displays a grid of all members (up to 26) with loading and error states, navigating to member detail on card click.
frontend/src/components/PaymentHistory.t: Table component showing payment history for a specific member with date and amount columns, including loading and empty states.
frontend/src/components/PaymentQRCode.ts: Card displaying a payment QR code image and UPI ID with a copy-to-clipboard button for payment collection.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog for first-time profile setup requiring name and 10-digit mobile number, non-dismissible until completed.
frontend/src/components/RecordPaymentFor: Form component for admins to record a payment for a specific member with amount input and validation.
frontend/src/components/SummaryStats.tsx: Dashboard widget displaying two stat cards: total members (out of 26) and total amount collected in rupees.
frontend/src/contexts/LanguageContext.ts: React context provider managing language state (English/Hindi) with localStorage persistence, browser language detection, and translation function.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Manages the backend actor instance using React Query, creating authenticated or anonymous actors based on Internet Identity state and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context and hooks for login/logout, managing identity state, delegation validation, and authentication status throughout the application.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend operations including user profiles, admin checks, member management, payments, and summary statistics with automatic cache invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useTranslation.ts: Simple hook to access the LanguageContext for internationalization, throwing an error if used outside the LanguageProvider.
frontend/src/i18n/translations.ts: Contains translation strings for English and Hindi languages covering all UI text including app name, navigation, forms, messages, and page content.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark themes using a warm amber/teal color palette suitable for a banking application.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query and Internet Identity providers, then renders the main App component into the DOM.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin-only page that displays member management, add member form, and summary statistics with access control checks and loading states.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Main landing page showing welcome message for unauthenticated users or dashboard with quick action cards for authenticated users, including profile setup modal trigger.
frontend/src/pages/MemberDetail.tsx: React component displaying detailed member information including profile photo, contact details, payment summary, balance, payment history, and forms for recording payments and generating QR codes. Includes admin-specific features and loading/error states.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, storing, and managing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support and methods to clear sensitive parameters from URLs.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color scheme using OKLCH color space, container settings, border radius variables, custom shadows, Inter font family, and accordion animations with typography and container query plugins.
project_state.json: Project metadata describing a group banking app with 26-member capacity, ₹1000/month installments, loan system with 2% interest, penalty tracking, admin credentials (mobile: 9315341037, password: 1311), UPI payment QR (9315341037@ybl), and Hindi/English support.
